rationale: The lemma relates [a]=[b] to (a,b) in R using only equivalence-class membership (def:equiv-class) and the reflexivity/symmetry/transitivity of R (def:equivalence-relation). def:partition and def:quotient-set are removed: neither appears in the statement and neither is used in the proof -- in fact this lemma is PRIOR to and used by the partition/quotient results (0017), so depending on them inverts the order (and risks a cycle).
notes: Over-inclusion removal. This basic class-equality criterion underlies thm:equiv-partition (0017); the partition and quotient-set notions are downstream of it, not inputs.
